name: Uteri Somnia
descriptionTemplate:
Team Unique: Hand Limit +2. Effects of the same type cannot stack. The wielder's Keyflare Regen and Exalt's Final DMG & Shield Generation +[StateArg1]%.
Switching to {Tranquil Sea} stance increases the wielder's Aliemus by [StateArg2], 3 turns cooldown.
Switching to {Raging Waves} stance inflicts [StateArg3] stacks of {Birth Ritual} on all enemies, 3 turns cooldown.
